fields.wbText:
At Ember & Rye, every plate tells a story. We source heritage-breed beef from family farms, age it in-house, and cook it over a live wood fire. Our menu changes with the seasons, our wine list spans three continents, and our bar team crafts cocktails that deserve the same attention as the food.

Open Tuesday – Sunday, 5 pm – 11 pm. Walk-ins welcome; reservations recommended.
